title: Home & Family
shortSummary: Talk about your family members and describe where you live.
culturalNote: Family is the heart of Chinese culture, and respect for elders runs deep, reflected in the famous value of 孝 (filial piety). Family terms are very precise: there are different words for an older brother (哥哥) and a younger brother (弟弟), and for relatives on the mother's versus the father's side. Many families span three generations, and grandparents often play a big role in raising children.

keyPhrases.pinyin: nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?
keyPhrases.english: How many people in your family?

grammar.explanation: 有 (yǒu) means 'have' or 'there is/are': 我有两个姐姐 (I have two older sisters). It is negated only with 没, never 不: 我没有兄弟 (I have no brothers).

examples.en: There are four people in my family.

grammar.commonMistake: Negating 有 with 不: it is 没有, not 不有.

grammar.rule: The measure word 口 for family
grammar.explanation: When counting family members, Chinese uses the special measure word 口 (kǒu): 三口人 (three people in the family). For people in general, the measure word is 个.
grammar.commonMistake: Using 个 when counting family size. Family members take 口: 三口人.

dialogue.setup: Lin shows her classmate a family photo on her phone.

lines.speaker: 同学
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì nǐ de jiārén ma?

lines.speaker: 林
lines.chinese: 对，这是我爸爸、妈妈和姐姐。
lines.pinyin: Duì, zhè shì wǒ bàba, māma hé jiějie.
lines.english: Yes, this is my dad, mum, and older sister.

lines.speaker: 同学
lines.pinyin: Nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?
lines.english: How many people in your family?

lines.speaker: 同学
lines.chinese: 我家有三口人，我没有兄弟姐妹。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu sān kǒu rén, wǒ méiyǒu xiōngdì jiěmèi.

lines.speaker: 林
lines.pinyin: Nǐ jiějie zhù zài jiā lǐ ma?
lines.english: Does your sister live at home?

quiz.question: How do you say 'I have one child'?
我_____有兄弟。 (I have no brothers)
quiz.explanation: 有 is negated with 没, giving 没有.

quiz.question: Which means 'older brother'?
quiz.explanation: 哥哥 is older brother; 弟弟 is younger brother.

quiz.question: Which measure word counts family members?
quiz.explanation: Family size uses 口: 三口人.

quiz.question: Arrange: 人 / 几口 / 有 / 你家
quiz.explanation: 你家 (your family) + 有 + 几口人 (how many people).
